classes.reasoning: Document explicitly self-identifies as 'eTMF-001 — TRIAL MASTER FILE INDEX' in the title and provides a structured index of Trial Master File artifacts organized by DIA TMF Reference Model zones and sections, tracking document status, versions, and filing dates.

summary: This is a Trial Master File index document (eTMF-001) for study BIORCE-ONC-2023-001, maintained in Veeva Vault. It provides a comprehensive index of all TMF artifacts organized according to the DIA TMF Reference Model v3.0, tracking document filing status, versions, ownership, and overall TMF health metrics. The index shows 61% of artifacts are complete with ongoing site-level documentation in progress.
